text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, toward the end of summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Can we talk for a minute?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know group training is over for today, but I'd
like to train on my own a little more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I brought a training plan. Could you take a look
at it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The paper she hands me is full of tough exercises,
grouped by the different skills she wants to hone.
choice_data_list: Did you come up with this yourself?
Did you come up with this yourself?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
N-no. I wouldn't be able to come up with
something this detailed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove made it for us underclassmen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She wanted everyone to have a productive
summer camp, so it's mainly centered around solo
training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She is, isn't she? Anyway, I'd like to try these
exercises out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Choose something from the list that'll suit me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Could you choose something from the list that'll
suit me, please?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a quick look over the sheet and decide that
the best regimen to help her improve is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a quick look over the sheet and decide that
the best regimen to help her improve is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That one's a full-body strength training regimen,
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I bet Ryan would like it a lot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and decide the number of sets I should
do, and make it tough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Could you decide how many sets I should do?
And make it so it's really challenging, please.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to do all I can to get ready for the Shuka
Sho and surpass my limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to do all I can to get ready for the Shuka
Sho and surpass my limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You'd better put your all into this too. Just so
we're clear, I have no intention of giving up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You can put your all into this too. I'll show you
what I can do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Dober starts training up her
muscles of steel with the setting sun behind her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Dober starts training up her
muscles of steel with the setting sun behind her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite how demanding the workout is, Mejiro
Dober completes every last exercise without
giving up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Dober! Look at her go... Looks like she's really
pushing herself hard...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: U-um, excuse me! Is she gonna be okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I mean, I know she will be, of course!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I guess I'm just worried she's overdoing it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan, you don't have to worry about me. I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober! Are... you sure?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Thanks for looking out for me, but I'm not
overdoing anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm challenging myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: This is me trying to push my limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I still have a little left to do, so I'll be back in a
bit. See you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Dober...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wow... I've never seen her so determined before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Is she? That makes me happy to hear... but also a
little sad. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Dober! Lemme join you! Let's pack on those
muscles!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan joins her, and the two of them train
together, their sweat sparkling in the light of the
setting sun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's the one with the full sprint shuttle runs
along the beach, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You really chose the most daunting workout on
there. Good to know you're on the same page as
me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: All right. Keep up the pressure on me while I run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
All right. Can you keep up the pressure on me
while I run?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If my pace drops even a little, call me out on it
until I pick it back up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If my pace drops even a little, call me out on it
until I pick it back up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to do all I can to get ready for the Shuka
Sho and surpass my limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to do all I can to get ready for the Shuka
Sho and surpass my limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Just so we're clear, I have no intention of giving
up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Keep your eyes on me. I'll show you what I can do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober starts testing her tenacity with the
setting sun behind her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober starts testing her tenacity with the
setting sun behind her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm not through yet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I've still got more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite how demanding the workout is, Mejiro
Dober continues running without giving up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite how demanding the workout is, Mejiro
Dober continues running without giving up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, just as she's getting close to her final set...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Is she doing Air Groove's tenacity training
from hell?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: U-um, excuse me! Is she gonna be okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I mean, I know she will be, of course!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I guess I'm just worried she's overdoing it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan, you don't have to worry about me. I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober! Are... you sure?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Thanks for looking out for me, but I'm not
overdoing anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm challenging myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: This is me trying to push my limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I still have a little left to do, so I'll be back in a
bit. See you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Prepare the next set!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Dober...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wow... I've never seen her so determined before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Is she? That makes me happy to hear... but also a
little sad. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Dober! Lemme join you! Let's pack on those
muscles!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan joins her, and the two of them train
together, their sweat sparkling in the light of the
setting sun!
